overview.description: The iShares TIPS Bond ETF (TIP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury inflation-protected securities with at least one year remaining in maturity. TIP was launched on Dec 4, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Treasury Inflation Linked Bond
